let lang = 'az';

const TABS = ['food','khachapuri','khinkali','drinks','wine','desserts'];
const TAB_KEYS = ['tab_food','tab_khach','tab_khink','tab_drinks','tab_wine','tab_sweet'];

function go(l) {
  lang = l;
  document.getElementById('lang-screen').style.display = 'none';
  const site = document.getElementById('site');
  site.style.display = 'block';
  setTimeout(()=> site.style.opacity = '1', 20);
  applyLang();
  buildMenu();
}

function applyLang() {
  const t = T[lang];
  document.querySelectorAll('[data-t]').forEach(el => {
    const k = el.getAttribute('data-t');
    if(t[k]) el.textContent = t[k];
  });
  document.getElementById('ls-prompt').textContent = t.lang_prompt || '';
  document.documentElement.lang = lang;
}

function buildMenu() {
  const t = T[lang];
  // tabs
  const tabsEl = document.getElementById('menu-tabs');
  tabsEl.innerHTML = '';
  TABS.forEach((tab, i) => {
    const btn = document.createElement('button');
    btn.className = 'm-tab' + (i===0?' on':'');
    btn.textContent = t[TAB_KEYS[i]] || tab;
    btn.onclick = () => switchTab(tab);
    tabsEl.appendChild(btn);
  });
  // panels
  const panelsEl = document.getElementById('menu-panels');
  panelsEl.innerHTML = '';
  TABS.forEach((tab, i) => {
    const div = document.createElement('div');
    div.className = 'm-panel' + (i===0?' on':'');
    div.id = 'panel-'+tab;
    const cats = MENU[tab] || [];
    cats.forEach(cat => {
      const sec = document.createElement('div');
      sec.className = 'm-sec';
      const sub = cat.sub_key ? `<div class="m-sec-sub">${t[cat.sub_key]||''}</div>` : '';
      sec.innerHTML = `<div class="m-sec-head">${t[cat.section_key]||cat.section_key}</div>${sub}<div class="m-sec-hr"></div>`;
      cat.items.forEach(item => {
        const row = document.createElement('div');
        row.className = 'm-item';
        row.innerHTML = `<span class="m-name">${item[lang]||item.az}</span><span class="m-price">${item.price} ₼</span>`;
        sec.appendChild(row);
      });
      div.appendChild(sec);
    });
    panelsEl.appendChild(div);
  });
}

function switchTab(tab) {
  document.querySelectorAll('.m-tab').forEach((b,i)=>b.classList.toggle('on', TABS[i]===tab));
  document.querySelectorAll('.m-panel').forEach(p=>p.classList.toggle('on', p.id==='panel-'+tab));
}

function submitForm(e) {
  e.preventDefault();
  const t = T[lang];
  const toast = document.getElementById('toast');
  toast.textContent = t.success_msg || 'Rezervasiya qəbul edildi!';
  toast.classList.add('show');
  setTimeout(()=>toast.classList.remove('show'), 4000);
  e.target.reset();
}

function lb(src) {
  document.getElementById('lb-img').src = src;
  document.getElementById('lb').classList.add('open');
  document.body.style.overflow = 'hidden';
}
function closeLb() {
  document.getElementById('lb').classList.remove('open');
  document.body.style.overflow = '';
}

// Reveal on scroll
const obs = new IntersectionObserver(entries => {
  entries.forEach(e => { if(e.isIntersecting) e.target.classList.add('in'); });
}, {threshold:.1});
document.querySelectorAll('.reveal').forEach(el => obs.observe(el));

// Init opacity
document.getElementById('site').style.opacity = '0';
document.getElementById('site').style.transition = 'opacity .5s';
</script>
</body>
</html>
